escalations.title: Handlebars JavaScript Injection — Remote Code Execution
escalations.impact: Arbitrary JavaScript execution via template manipulation. If handlebars processes user-controlled templates, attacker achieves RCE with no privileges.
escalations.fix: Determine if handlebars is in production code (grep -r 'handlebars' Source/Backend). If test-only: move to devDependencies, upgrade to >=4.7.9. If production: upgrade immediately. If unused: remove.

escalations.title: Protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution
escalations.impact: Malicious .proto file or serialized protobuf message triggers arbitrary JavaScript execution during parse. Orchestrator compromise = full pipeline compromise.
escalations.fix: cd platform/orchestrator && npm audit fix && npm install protobufjs@^7.5.5 --save. Audit all protobuf data sources.

escalations.title: path-to-regexp ReDoS — all HTTP routes vulnerable to Denial of Service
escalations.impact: Crafted route parameters with many segments trigger catastrophic regex backtracking, hanging the server. Zero-precondition DoS.
escalations.fix: cd Source/Backend && npm install express@^5 --save; cd platform/orchestrator && npm install express@^5 --save. Review Express v5 migration guide.

p1_findings.title: GET /api/search not wired — DependencyPicker 404s in production
p1_findings.impact: DependencyPicker typeahead broken in production. 5 tests actively failing.
p1_findings.fix: Add GET /api/search route to app.ts. Implementation: store.findAll() filtered on title/description. Pass all 5 search.test.ts tests.

p1_findings.title: Specifications/ describes a different system than Source/ — 101 requirements untracked
p1_findings.impact: Full spec coverage is 23% (not 97%). Traceability enforcer gives false-green. Agents reading Specifications/ get incorrect system picture.
p1_findings.fix: Strategic decision required: (a) add Status: PLANNED headers to unimplemented specs; (b) move to docs/future/; (c) extend enforcer to check Specifications/. Document in CLAUDE.md.

p2_findings.title: Express 2 major versions behind (v4.18 → v5.2) — missing security patches
p2_findings.fix: cd Source/Backend && npm install express@^5.2.1 --save; cd platform/orchestrator && npm install express@^5.2.1 --save. Review v5 migration guide.
p2_findings.cross_ref: DEP-003 (path-to-regexp ReDoS resolved by this upgrade)

p2_findings.title: Pino 2 major versions behind (v8 → v10) — missing performance and security improvements
UUID 5 major versions behind (v9 → v14) — CVE present in v9
p2_findings.fix: cd Source/Backend && npm install uuid@^14.0.0 --save (resolves DEP-004 simultaneously)

p2_findings.title: FR-070–FR-085 have no canonical specification document
p2_findings.fix: Either delete FR-070–FR-085 references from api-contracts.md and align with FR-dependency-* IDs, or create a proper plan/spec doc defining FR-070–FR-085.

p2_findings.title: dependencyCheckDuration histogram absent from metrics.ts — FR-dependency-metrics 75% complete
p2_findings.fix: Add dependencyCheckDuration histogram to metrics.ts. Instrument isReady() and computeHasUnresolvedBlockers(). Add assertion in metrics.test.ts.

p2_findings.title: pending_dependencies status missing from WorkItemStatus enum — dispatch gating returns 400
p2_findings.fix: Add PendingDependencies = 'pending-dependencies' to WorkItemStatus. Update VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS, dispatch route, onItemResolved, StatusBadge.tsx. Coordinate api-contract agent for shared type change.

p2_findings.title: 4 duplicate frontend test files across tests/ and tests/pages/ — false-green CI risk
p2_findings.fix: Pick canonical location (tests/pages/), merge unique test cases from flat tests/ into it, delete flat duplicates. Run test suite to confirm zero regressions.

p2_findings.title: Source/E2E/tests/ directory does not exist — Playwright has nothing to run
p2_findings.fix: Create Source/E2E/tests/ with smoke tests covering: create work item, route, dispatch happy paths. Playwright testDir: './tests' currently resolves to void.

p3_findings.title: PostCSS XSS via unescaped </style> tags (dev server only)
p3_findings.fix: cd Source/Frontend && npm install vite@latest --save-dev (pulls in patched postcss)

p3_findings.title: esbuild CORS/CSRF in dev server allows any website to read responses
brace-expansion process hang via zero-step sequences (CVSS 6.5)
React 1 major version behind (v18.3 → v19.2)
p3_findings.fix: cd Source/Frontend && npm install react@^19 react-dom@^19 --save. Review React 19 migration guide — breaking changes to useEffect and removed APIs.

p3_findings.title: React Router 1 major version behind (v6.26 → v7.14)
p3_findings.fix: cd Source/Frontend && npm install react-router-dom@^7 --save. Significant breaking changes — review migration guide.

p3_findings.title: Dockerode major version available (v4 → v5) — requires Node 18+
p3_findings.fix: cd platform/orchestrator && npm install dockerode@^5 --save (verify Node 18+ first)

p3_findings.title: Logger always emits JSON — no dev-mode pretty-print (violates FR-003)
p3_findings.fix: Add NODE_ENV !== 'production' check; use formatted output (JSON.stringify with indentation or chalk) in dev mode. Update logger tests to cover both modes.

p3_findings.title: Dual logger abstraction — two modules with different call conventions
p3_findings.fix: Pick one call convention (prefer object-style {msg, ...ctx}). Update all callers. Delete the compatibility shim.

p3_findings.title: FR-dependency-seed not implemented — no seed data script
p3_findings.fix: Create Source/Backend/src/seed.ts. Call addDependency() with specified pairs on startup (SEED_DATA=true env var). Guard with existence check for idempotency.

p4_findings.title: 2 eslint-disable-next-line directives without explanation comments
p4_findings.fix: Add // reason: comment after each suppression explaining the intentional omission.

p4_findings.title: DebugPortalPage.tsx has non-standard traceability comment — not a valid FR-XXX reference
p4_findings.fix: Change comment to: // Infrastructure: debug portal — not spec-tracked

cross_reference_map.single_fix: npm install express@^5.2.1 in Source/Backend and platform/orchestrator

cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 3 findings (postcss + esbuild are transitive deps)

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Spec drift — Specifications/ not maintained alongside implementation
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add Status headers to unimplemented specs; extend traceability enforcer to cover Specifications/
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves structural drift; prevents false-green CI on 101 requirements

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add PendingDependencies to WorkItemStatus; update dispatch route, transitions, StatusBadge, onItemResolved
cross_reference_map.fix_impact: Resolves 1 finding across 4 files; requires coordinated shared-type change
Resolves 2 findings (CVE + version lag in same package)

grading.rationale: 4 P1 findings exceed the C threshold (max_p1: 2). Two are CRITICAL CVEs (CVSS 9.8) in transitive dependencies. Two are fundamental spec-drift violations (missing route, specs/source mismatch).

prerequisites: Services must be live for dynamic testing (performance-profiler, chaos-monkey)
npm audit added to CI/CD pipeline
